At this cost, this phone is awesome. Camera, Screen, Battery everything is awesome. However, on careful inspection some sensors are missing when compared to Xiaomi and other Chinese brands.

This phone is a budget phone which will help with long 1 and half day battery life with always full brightness, location and data on . Camera is good on pro mode but cannot be compared with high pixel phones. 6 GB ram is enough for play games. This phone has enough fps for games like pubg, asphalt games no lag.

Bought this for my parents and they love it. As I am using A52 myself, I feel M12 delivers at its price range and then some. The fingerprint sensor is fast and accurate. Having 90 Hz Adaptive display is wonderful.Camera is decent as well, with options for Macro (attached) and Wide Angle being good as well. Haven't experienced any lags on medium workloads.Android 11 with updated UI, Smart View, Dolby Atmos, Good Battery Life are some highlights.Very satisfied with the purchase.
